problem id: 632444af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) OR SHR(5)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  00100101 -> 01000010
  11001000 -> 10000100
  01111011 -> 10110111
  10000000 -> 00000000
  11110101 -> 01001111
  00000101 -> 00000000
  01111100 -> 11000011
  00111001 -> 00010011

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 10000100
